question.ask: ets_th4 Why does Tina think the activity is useful?

info.value: Welcome to the Volunteer Club. I'm Tina. We are going to plant trees in Central Park this Saturday. We will meet at our school gate at 6:30 am. It will take us about one and a half hours to get there by school bus. Here are some suggestions for you. First, you'd better wear comfortable shoes and bring your umbrella. Second, bring your own lunch with you. In my opinion, this activity is very useful. It can help us learn some working skills. I hope all of you will have a good time this Saturday.
